query: How does the card list BMS map COCRDLI work?

results.name: COCRDLI Header
results.content:

        TITLE 'BMS MAP FOR CARD LISTING'

results.name: COCRDLI
results.content:
COCRDLI DFHMSD LANG=COBOL,                                             -
               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM

results.name: CCRDLIA
results.content:
CCRDLIA DFHMDI CTRL=(FREEKB),                                          -
               DSATTS=(COLOR,HILIGHT,PS,VALIDN),                       -
               MAPATTS=(COLOR,HILIGHT,PS,VALIDN),                      -
               SIZE=(24,80)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Tran:'
TRNNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=4,                                               -
               POS=(1,7)
TITLE01 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(1,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Date:'
CURDATE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(1,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='mm/dd/yy'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Prog:'
PGMNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,7)
TITLE02 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(2,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Time:'
CURTIME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='hh:mm:ss'
        DFHMDF COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=17,                                              -
               POS=(4,31),                                             -
               INITIAL='List Credit Cards'
        DFHMDF LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(4,70),                                             -
               INITIAL='Page '
PAGENO  DFHMDF LENGTH=3,                                               -
               POS=(4,76)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=19,                                              -
               POS=(6,22),                                             -
               INITIAL='Account Number    :'
ACCTSID DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,IC,NORM,UNPROT),                            -

               LENGTH=11,                                              -
               POS=(6,44)

               POS=(6,56)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=19,                                              -
               POS=(7,22),                                             -
               INITIAL='Credit Card Number:'
CARDSID DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,UNPROT),                               -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=16,                                              -
               POS=(7,44)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(7,61)
        DFHMDF COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=10,                                              -
               POS=(9,10),                                             -
               INITIAL='Select    '

        DFHMDF COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(10,65),                                            -

CRDSEL1 DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,PROT),                                 -

results.content:
CCRDSLA DFHMDI CTRL=(FREEKB),                                          -

               SIZE=(24,80)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -

               INITIAL='Tran:'

TITLE01 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(1,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -

               POS=(1,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Date:'
CURDATE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(1,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='mm/dd/yy'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Prog:'
PGMNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,7)
TITLE02 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(2,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Time:'
CURTIME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='hh:mm:ss'
        DFHMDF COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=23,                                              -
               POS=(4,30),                                             -
               INITIAL='View Credit Card Detail'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=19,                                              -
               POS=(7,23),                                             -
               INITIAL='Account Number    :'
ACCTSID DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,IC,NORM,UNPROT),                            -
               COLOR=DEFAULT,                                          -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=11,                                              -
               POS=(7,45)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(7,57)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=19,                                              -
               POS=(8,23),                                             -
               INITIAL='Card Number       :'
CARDSID DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,UNPROT),                               -
               COLOR=DEFAULT,                                          -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=16,                                              -
               POS=(8,45)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(8,62)
        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=20,                                              -
               POS=(11,4),                                             -
               INITIAL='Name on card      :'
CRDNAME DFHMDF HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=50,                                              -
               POS=(11,25)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(11,76)
        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=20,                                              -
               POS=(13,4),                                             -
               INITIAL='Card Active Y/N   : '
CRDSTCD DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP),                                          -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=1,                                               -
               POS=(13,25)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(13,27)
        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=20,                                              -
               POS=(15,4),                                             -
               INITIAL='Expiry Date       : '
EXPMON  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP),                                          -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=2,                                               -
               POS=(15,25)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=1,                                               -
               POS=(15,28),                                            -
               INITIAL='/'
EXPYEAR DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP),                                          -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=4,                                               -
               POS=(15,30)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(15,35)
INFOMSG DFHMDF ATTRB=(PROT),                                           -
               COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               HILIGHT=OFF,                                            -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(20,25)
ERRMSG  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT,FSET),                                 -
               COLOR=RED,                                              -
               LENGTH=80,                                              -
               POS=(23,1)
FKEYS   DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=75,                                              -
               POS=(24,1),                                             -
               INITIAL='ENTER=Search Cards  F3=Exit'
        DFHMSD TYPE=FINAL
        END

* Ver: CardDemo_v1.0-70-g193b394-123 Date: 2022-08-22 17:02:42 CDT
*

        DFHMDF COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=26,                                              -
               POS=(4,30),                                             -
               INITIAL='Update Credit Card Details'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=19,                                              -
               POS=(7,23),                                             -

        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -

        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -

               LENGTH=50,                                              -
               POS=(11,25)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -

        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -

        DFHMDF LENGTH=1,                                               -

               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=21,                                              -
               POS=(24,1),                                             -
               INITIAL='ENTER=Process F3=Exit'
FKEYSC  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,DRK),                                      -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=18,                                              -
               POS=(24,23),                                            -
               INITIAL='F5=Save F12=Cancel'
        DFHMSD TYPE=FINAL
